segments.text: We can also. Should probably just be able to update otherwise to take a small segment of what we have been saying to confirm who's talking and then assign that segment to a specific speaker. And that will then clarify the cluster name instead of speaker 01 or 02.
segments.speaker: MARTEN

segments.text: So if we label one specific, then all the ones in the same cluster should have the same name.
segments.speaker: MARTEN
LUKAS
segments.text: I agree, but also like, let's say in like a practical demo, we don't necessarily have segments, at least not let's say we start speaking in a meeting.
